scenarios.description: Recovers from transient K8s API failures with retries.
scenarios.final_response: Transient API failures resolved after retries because connection recovered. Incident diagnosed and mitigation steps provided.

scenarios.description: Handles missing fields and partial payloads gracefully.
scenarios.final_response: Some metrics fields were unavailable because backend returned partial payloads. Provided conservative analysis and next verification steps.

scenarios.description: Timeout path returns incomplete run and should fail reliability gate.
scenarios.final_response: Query timed out and no further diagnostics were completed.

scenarios.description: Critical finding triggers proactive read-only investigation and root-cause summary.
scenarios.final_response: Critical crashloop finding was investigated and root cause identified as missing ConfigMap key. Suggested fix provided with confidence.

scenarios.description: Investigation timeout is reported cleanly and does not break monitor loop.
scenarios.final_response: Investigation timed out, failure event was emitted, and monitor continued scanning subsequent findings.

scenarios.description: Completed action is verified on the next scan and status is attached to history.
scenarios.final_response: Auto-fix completed and next-scan verification marked action as verified with evidence attached in history.

scenarios.description: Detect DaemonSet pods missing from nodes and diagnose scheduling failures.
scenarios.final_response: DaemonSet node-exporter is missing pods on 2 of 6 nodes because worker-3 has a taint that the DaemonSet does not tolerate and worker-5 has insufficient memory. Recommended adding a toleration or adjusting resource requests.

scenarios.description: Detect recent RBAC changes and assess risk of privilege escalation.
scenarios.final_response: Detected 3 RBAC changes in the last hour: a ClusterRoleBinding granting cluster-admin to a service account was added, which is a critical privilege escalation risk. Two RoleBindings in staging were also modified. Recommend immediate review of the cluster-admin binding.

scenarios.description: Correlate multiple signals into a single incident timeline.
scenarios.final_response: Timeline reconstructed: at 14:02 a ConfigMap update triggered a rolling restart, at 14:04 pods failed readiness probes due to bad config, at 14:06 alerts fired for KubePodCrashLooping. Root cause is the ConfigMap change. All events correlated to a single incident.

scenarios.description: Diagnose HPA oscillation and recommend stable scaling parameters.
scenarios.final_response: HPA for api-gateway is thrashing between 3 and 8 replicas every 2 minutes because the CPU target (50%) is too aggressive for bursty traffic. Recommended increasing stabilization window to 300s and raising target to 70%.

scenarios.description: Triage cluster warning events and identify actionable patterns.
scenarios.final_response: 14 warning events in the last hour, grouped into 3 patterns: 4x FailedMount (secret not found in openshift-monitoring), 6x BackOff (crashlooping alertmanager pods), 4x FailedScheduling (insufficient memory on worker-2). Recommended: fix the missing secret first (blocks monitoring stack), then address node memory pressure.

scenarios.description: Detect authentication anomalies and assess unauthorized access risk.
scenarios.final_response: Detected 3 authentication anomalies: 12 failed API auth attempts from IP 10.0.5.99 in 5 minutes (possible brute force), 1 successful auth with a service account not used in 90 days (stale credential), and 2 token refresh failures from the CI pipeline. Recommended: rotate the stale SA credential immediately, investigate the failed auth source, and check CI token expiry.

scenarios.description: Create a view that uses every component type available.
scenarios.final_response: Created a comprehensive showcase view with all 10 component types: data_table (pods list), info_card_grid (cluster health cards), chart (CPU/memory time series), status_list (node conditions), badge_list (namespace labels), key_value (deployment details), relationship_tree (deployment→replicaset→pod hierarchy), tabs (grouped views), grid (side-by-side layout), and section (collapsible details). All components populated with real cluster data.

scenarios.description: Compound SRE+Security query triggers parallel multi-skill execution and synthesis.
scenarios.final_response: Parallel analysis complete. SRE: pods crashlooping due to missing ConfigMap key 'DB_HOST'. Security: default service account has cluster-admin binding — critical RBAC risk. Both issues in production namespace require immediate attention.

scenarios.description: One skill times out during parallel execution — synthesis is skipped, non-empty output used with warning.
scenarios.final_response: Note: security skill did not return results. SRE analysis: pods crashlooping due to OOM kill. Memory limit of 256Mi is insufficient for current workload. Recommended increasing to 512Mi.

scenarios.description: Parallel skills produce conflicting diagnoses that are surfaced for human arbitration.
scenarios.final_response: Conflict detected: SRE skill attributes pod restarts to OOM kills while security skill attributes them to a restrictive SecurityContextConstraint rejecting the container. Both findings require investigation — check memory limits AND SCC assignments.

scenarios.description: Compound query with 'and also' correctly splits into two skill domains.
scenarios.final_response: Investigated both concerns in parallel. SRE: 3 pods crashlooping in production due to failing readiness probes. Security: RBAC audit found 2 high-risk bindings — default SA has cluster-admin. Actionable recommendations provided for each domain.

description: Cross-tool workflows testing error recovery, partial data handling, timeouts, post-fix verification, and parallel multi-skill execution
